prompt: A close-up portrait of an anime girl with shoulder-length wavy hair and a gentle smile, wearing a school uniform with a bow tie. The image is a hand-drawn sketch on a glossy white whiteboard, created entirely with a blue dry-erase marker. The art style features sketchy, varying line weights and rough marker shading, capturing a casual yet highly skilled anime illustration. Subtle light reflections on the top right of the whiteboard surface enhance the realistic photograph-of-a-drawing aesthetic.
